description: Clarify is an AI-native CRM for sales teams. It stores CRM records and offers automation, analytics, and AI assistant features for working with pipeline, contacts, meetings, and related sales data.
summary: Clarify exposes a REST API authenticated by Clarify-issued API keys and a streamable-HTTP MCP server at https://api.clarify.ai/mcp authenticated via Clarify OAuth; no public GraphQL API or first-party CLI was found.
